## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**PROJECT_CHKPNT** -> PROJECT_CHKPNT (CHK_DATE->CHK_TIME, CHK_TIME->CHK_DATE); PROJECT_MASTER (PROJECT -> PROJECT); USER_INFORMATION (CHK_WHO -> GS_USER)

**PROJECT_CURR_BUDG** -> PROJECT_GROUP (F_GROUP -> F_GROUP); PROJECT_MASTER (PROJECT -> PROJECT); PROJECT_PHASE_D (PHASE -> PHASE); USER_INFORMATION (WHO_CREATED->GS_USER, WHO_MODIFIED->GS_USER, WHO_REFRESH->GS_USER)

**PROJECT_FUTURE** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); JOB_HEADER (PARENT_WO->JOB, PARENT_WO_SUF->SUFFIX, WO->JOB, WO_SUFF->SUFFIX); LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOC -> LOCN); PO_HEADER (PO -> PURCHASE_ORDER); PO_LINES (PO_LINE -> RECORD_NO); PROJECT_MASTER (PROJECT -> PROJECT); PROJECT_PHASE (PHASE -> PHASE)

**PROJECT_HISTORY** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUSTOMER -> CUSTOMER); GL_MASTER (COR_CREDIT_ACCT->GL_ACCOUNT, COR_DEBIT_ACCT->GL_ACCOUNT, REV_CREDIT_ACCT->GL_ACCOUNT, REV_DEBIT_ACCT->GL_ACCOUNT); PROJECT_MASTER (PROJECT -> PROJECT); USER_INFORMATION (WHO_CLOSED->GS_USER, WHO_CREATED->GS_USER, WHO_LOCKED->GS_USER, WHO_MODIFIED->GS_USER, WHO_REFRESH->GS_USER, WHO_REV_REC->GS_USER)

**PROJECT_MASTER** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUSTOMER -> CUSTOMER); GL_MASTER (COR_CREDIT_ACCT->GL_ACCOUNT, COR_DEBIT_ACCT->GL_ACCOUNT, REV_CREDIT_ACCT->GL_ACCOUNT, REV_DEBIT_ACCT->GL_ACCOUNT); USER_INFORMATION (WHO_CLOSED->GS_USER, WHO_CREATED->GS_USER, WHO_LOCKED->GS_USER, WHO_MODIFIED->GS_USER, WHO_REFRESH->GS_USER)

**PROJECT_PHASE** -> PROJECT_MASTER (PROJECT -> PROJECT); PROJECT_PHASE_D (PHASE -> PHASE)

**PROJECT_PHASE_CHK** -> PROJECT_MASTER (PROJECT -> PROJECT); PROJECT_PHASE (PHASE -> PHASE); USER_INFORMATION (CHK_WHO -> GS_USER)

**PROJECT_WO** -> PROJECT_MASTER (PROJECT -> PROJECT); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**PROJECT_XREF** -> JOB_HEADER (WO->JOB, WO_SUFF->SUFFIX); JOB_OPERATIONS (WO_SEQ -> SEQ); ORDER_HIST_HEAD (IVC -> INVOICE); PO_LINES (PO_LINE -> RECORD_NO); PROJECT_GROUP (F_GROUP -> F_GROUP); PROJECT_MASTER (PROJECT -> PROJECT); PROJECT_PHASE_D (PHASE -> PHASE); QUOTE_HEADER (QUOTE -> QUOTE_NO); QUOTE_LINES (QUOTE_LINE -> RECORD_NO); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)
